t_ch: …啊哈哈。我虽然向往星空，但有时也得把目光转回大地才行。
t_en: ...Ehehe. Well, I do yearn for the skies, but I should also occasionally have to turn my face back down to earth.

t_ch: 先说具体内容。
t_en: Give me more details first.

t_ch: 英雄，听说你来自天外之界，可能有所不知…曾经的圣城远不止现在这么点地盘。
t_en: I hear you're from a world beyond the sky, so you might not know this... But the holy city used to span across far greater lands than what you see now.

t_ch: 在很久以前，奥赫玛周围曾经簇拥着许多附属城邦——就像黎明机器被欧洛尼斯的群星围绕那样。
t_en: A long time ago, countless allied cities existed around Okhema... In the same way that Oronyx's stars surround the Dawn Device.

t_ch: 那时的奥赫玛是真正的「永恒之城」。比起一座城市，它更接近一位母亲。站在山崖上向外眺望，视野所及之处全是我们的领土！
t_en: Okhema was a true "Eternal City" back then. People did not think of it as their city, but rather a motherly figure. When one stood on top of the hill and looked outward, everything we could see was our territory!

t_ch: …后来，黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，城墙以里成了唯一安全的地方，这些地方逐渐都被废弃了。
t_en: ...Then, the black tide raged stronger. The area within the city walls became the only safe place, while all other regions gradually grew deserted.

t_ch: 好惨…
t_en: How tragic...

t_ch: …谁说不是呢？不过多亏了这段往事，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。
t_en: ...Isn't it? But it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.

t_ch: 为什么要废弃？
t_en: Why were they deserted?

t_ch: 想守住那么大一片区域，哪有退守城墙容易？也多亏了这段历史，我们才有大赚一笔的机会。
t_en: Rather than protecting such a vast territory, isn't it more feasible to fall back and defend just the city walls? But I guess it's also thanks to these events of the past that we have an opportunity to strike it rich.

t_ch: 我们要去倒斗？
t_en: Are we going to... go grave digging?

t_ch: 呃，也不能算错。准确的说，我们是去回收有用的东西。
t_en: Err, you're not entirely wrong. I am more inclined to think that we're going to bring back items that still have worth.

t_ch: 听说尼卡多利还活跃的那会儿，圣城墙外统统生活在疯王的阴影下，个别城邦甚至被他投出的巨矛砸进了地里…那种地方我们肯定去不了。
t_en: When Nikador was still active, everything beyond the walls of the holy city was living under the mad king's shadow. Their giant spear even sent some states buried several feet into the ground... We're not going to reach those places for sure.

t_ch: 如今你们讨伐了疯王，他的眷属也不再像以前那样活跃。这正是外出探索的绝好时机！
t_en: His titankins are beginning to die down now that you've defeated the mad king, making this the perfect time to go on an adventure!

t_ch: 虽然这些旧城基本都被毁得差不多了，不过总有些犄角旮旯还能保持完好——比如藏在地下的部分。
t_en: The ancient cities may be in utter ruin by now, but I'm sure some parts of them managed to remain as they were... Say, places that have been buried underground.

t_ch: 前不久，我在附近的旧城内发现了一座地下宫殿。只要能从里面挖些宝贝回来，你想在圣城住多久、买什么，都不成问题！
t_en: I found an underground palace beneath an ancient hypogeum around here a while ago. Just dig up those treasures, and you can stay however long you want in the holy city... Heck, you can even buy whatever you want here!

t_ch: 真有那么值钱吗？
t_en: Are they really worth that much?

t_ch: 有句话怎么说的来着？「最值钱的东西都埋在地里。」当然，陷阱和危险也少不了……
t_en: How does that saying go again? Ah, "the most valuable things are all buried underground." Along with a ton of traps and danger, of course...

t_ch: 确定没有危险？
t_en: Are you sure it'll be safe?

t_ch: 我已经去踩点好几次了，一个怪物都没有…就是个别防御措施还没失效。
t_en: I've checked out the site a dozen times now and I haven't seen a single monster! ...Maybe except for a few of their defense mechanisms that are still functioning.

t_ch: 地宫是什么？
t_en: What's a hypogeum?

t_ch: 埋在地下、规模巨大的建筑群，多半是用来存放贵重物品的地方…就是可能有些防御措施。
t_en: A massive underground building complex that was likely used as a vault to store valuable items... and safeguarded with defense mechanisms that may be still functioning.

t_ch: 我对钱没有兴趣。
t_en: I'm not interested in money.

t_ch: …那你至少能得到荣耀。想象一下吧，「收复故土之人」，多么伟大的头衔。
t_en: ...But you'll at least receive glory. I mean, think about your potential title — "Reclaimer of Lost Lands"! Isn't that a noble title to be known by?

t_ch: 至于证据？你带回来的战利品就是最好的证明。只有搜集到足够多的战利品，大伙才会相信你确实完成了壮举。
t_en: As for proof? The treasures that you bring back will make for the most irrefutable proof. As long as you bring back a large enough pile of treasures, the rest will be convinced of your incredible feat.

t_ch: 总而言之，计划很简单，我负责带路，你负责解开那里的残余机关。得手后，咱俩三七分成。
t_en: In any case, our plan is simple: I'll lead the way, and you can sort out whatever mechanisms that remain. And when we finally get to the treasures, we can split them 3-7.

t_ch: 怎么才七成啊？
t_en: Why am I only getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak> of the treasures?

t_ch: 你只拿三成会不会太少了？
t_en: You're only taking <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of the treasures? Don't you want more?

t_ch: 啊？我的意思是，我拿七成，你拿三成。
t_en: Huh? I'm getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak>. The <unbreak>30%</unbreak> is yours.

t_ch: 你有重新选择措辞的机会。
t_en: You have a chance to reconsider your words.

t_ch: 那我不去了。
t_en: I'm not going then.

t_ch: …好吧，我承认，这事少了你办不成——但是少了我也一样。
t_en: ...Oh, alright. I'll admit that we can't do this without you... but the same goes for me.

t_ch: 咱们各退一步，对半开，如何？
t_en: Let's both compromise and agree on an equal split?

t_ch: 行。
t_en: Fine.

t_ch: 痛快，就爱跟你这样的人合作。
t_en: Excellent. That's why I like working with people like you.

t_ch: 不行。
t_en: Not okay.

t_ch: 唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
t_en: Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!

t_ch: 再问就九一开。
t_en: Negotiate any further and it'll be a 9-1 split.

t_ch: 唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
t_en: Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!

t_ch: 我已经找好了绕开城墙的最佳路线。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
t_en: I already have an ideal route to go around the city walls. Let's set off now.

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 再等等。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 记得做足准备，我等你回来。
t_en: Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.

t_ch: 带我去旧城探索吧。
t_en: I'm ready for our adventure. Lead the way to the ancient city.

t_ch: 好啊。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
t_en: Sure, let's set off now.

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 再等等。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 记得做足准备，我等你回来。
t_en: Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.

t_ch: 在达米亚诺斯的带领下，你来到了奥赫玛外的附属城邦，在地下的一扇门前停住了脚步……
t_en: With Damionis' guidance, you have come to a vassal city outside of Okhema and stopped before an underground door...

t_ch: 到了，就是这里。据我先前探明，通往地宫内部的路就在前方。
t_en: We're here. Based on my previous scouting of the area, this should be the way into the hypogeum.

t_ch: 听说它被{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量庇护，原先是用来对抗黑潮的避难所，之后嘛……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power supposedly protected this place. It used to be a shelter used to resist the black tide, but years later...

t_ch: 这里看起来和奥赫玛很像。
t_en: This place looks so similar to Okhema.

t_ch: 都是同一时期的建筑风格，差别大了反倒奇怪吧。
t_en: That's to be expected. They were built around the same period, after all.

t_ch: 不过这地宫都还没来得及派上用场，就被废弃了。
t_en: It's a pity that people back then ended up abandoning this hypogeum before it could serve its purpose.

t_ch: 听起来很安全。
t_en: Sounds like a safe place.

t_ch: 别提了。避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
t_en: Don't even begin. This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.

t_ch: 里面不会还有人吧？
t_en: We're not going to find anyone in here, right...?

t_ch: 怎么会？避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
t_en: Why would we? This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.

t_ch: 因为之后大伙意识到，黑潮一旦来了就不会褪去，再坚固的避难所也不能维持太久。
t_en: People later realized that the black tide does not retreat once it takes over a location, so even the most robust of shelters would not hold out for long.

t_ch: 与其在灾难来临时躺进棺材等死，不如从一开始就不让灾难发生……
t_en: Rather than making themselves comfortable somewhere safe while waiting for death to claim them, they decided they should prevent this disaster from even occurring...

t_ch: 所以说，这里面有好东西的概率还是很大的——如果我们能解开封印的话。
t_en: So, it only stands that there's a high chance of finding valuable treasures in there... provided we can break its seal.

t_ch: 封印？
t_en: Seal?

t_ch: 看见那个了吗？「预言算碑」，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的造物。正是它身上的禁制关闭了大门。
t_en: See that thing over there? That's a Prophecy Tablet, a creation of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Its containment mechanism is the very thing keeping this gate locked.

t_ch: 按理说这应该是雅努斯的权能，不过命运三泰坦亲如一家，能力互通倒也算合理。
t_en: This should actually be the authority of Janus, but seeing how close the Three Titans of Fate were, I guess it does make sense for them to share their powers.

t_ch: 总之，只要这玩意还存在，我们就没法继续前进。
t_en: Anyhow, as long as that tablet is active, we're not going to be making any progress.

t_ch: 你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄，解除封印对你来说应该不难——我等你的好消息！
t_en: Since you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs, I assume it wouldn't be difficult for you to break this seal? I'll be waiting for your good news, then!

t_ch: 门开了！不愧是你，光凭我自己可解不开这个。
t_en: Ooh, it's open! I knew I had to bring you along. I wouldn't have been able to open it on my own.

t_ch: 至于后面会遇到什么，就是完全的未知数了——真正的冒险，想想都激动！
t_en: Alright, I have no idea what we're going to encounter once we walk through here. But that's the spirit of adventuring! Just the thought of it excites me!

t_ch: 你不是画了地图吗？
t_en: Didn't you already draw a map of the place?

t_ch: 我拜托过{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的祭司，用他的预言和我的专业知识做了大概的勘探。但每个房间里具体有什么…只有亲自看过才知道。
t_en: I asked help from {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s priest, and I was able to use his prophecy and my personal expertise to briefly survey the area. However, if we want to know what's actually in each room... We will have to find out ourselves.

t_ch: 总之，我们还是继续前进吧。
t_en: In any case, we had better press on.

t_ch: 哦哦哦，冒险！
t_en: Woooh, an adventure!

t_ch: …你比我还激动。你才是真正的「探险家」！
t_en: Looks like you're even more excited by this prospect than me... You are indeed a true "explorer"!

t_ch: 继续前进吧。
t_en: Let's continue onward.

t_ch: 你们向地宫深处走去，脚下是凝结了不知多少历史的砖石。
t_en: You head deeper into the hypogeum. Along the way, you step on countless bricks, each a slice of history condensed over untold years.

t_ch: 又一扇门，又一道封印…不出所料。
t_en: As I expected... Here's another door and, along with it, yet another seal.

t_ch: 不过这看起来像是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的东西…为什么会出现在这里？
t_en: But this looks like a creation of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}... Why is it here?

t_ch: 总之只要解开它就好了吧？
t_en: Regardless of the reason, we just need to solve it, right?

t_ch: 根据套路，应该是这样没错。但泰坦的事情，谁又能说清了……
t_en: That should be the case, assuming this seal works the same as the others. However, when it comes to Titans, nothing is ever for certain...

t_ch: 有什么不对劲吗？
t_en: Is something wrong?

t_ch: 我只记得种地和骑大地兽时要拜吉奥里亚，没听说它还能封闭山洞…不过泰坦的弯弯绕，谁又能说清了？
t_en: I can only recall that people pray to Georios when they're farming or riding dromas. I've never heard of Georios being able to seal off caves before... Yet, when something involves the whims of Titans, who can really tell?

t_ch: 需要我吃土吗？
t_en: Do you need me to eat some soil?

t_ch: 呃…如果你打算靠这种方式伪装成大地兽，那我想应该没用。
t_en: Uh... If you believe that doing so would help you to disguise yourself as a dromas, I don't think that such a drastic step is really necessary.

t_ch: 总之你先试试能不能解除它，万一情况不妙咱们再溜就是。
t_en: Anyway, you should first try and see if you can break the seal. We can still flee if anything goes awry.

t_ch: 居然又成功了…或许这里的防御并没有我想象中那么严密。
t_en: I can't believe you succeeded again... Perhaps this place isn't as well-defended as I had imagined.

t_ch: 继续前进吧，希望里面还剩下值得带走的东西。
t_en: Let's continue onward. Hopefully there will still be items in this place valuable enough for us to bring back.

t_ch: 你们继续向地宫深处走去，耳边划过千百年未变的风声。
t_en: You progress even further into the depths of the hypogeum, and winds that have continued to blow for thousands of years whistling past your ears.

t_ch: 嚯，这里的空间真宽阔，比起如今的圣城都不遑多让啊。
t_en: Oh. It's really quite spacious here. In fact, it's comparable to the size of the holy city as it is nowadays.

t_ch: 没想到小小的附属城镇里居然还有这种地方，当时的建筑工艺可真发达。
t_en: I can't believe such a place could be located within a tiny ancillary town... The architectural craftsmanship of those days was truly advanced.

t_ch: 奥赫玛祖上还挺阔？
t_en: Okhema's ancestors must have been quite wealthy?

t_ch: 那是当然！早在黄金战争时期，奥赫玛就是当之无愧的「永恒之城」了。
t_en: Of course! Even as far back as the Chrysos War period, Okhema has always been the undisputed "Eternal City."

t_ch: 这个话题还是先放一放吧——看到那些复杂的道路了吗？想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
t_en: Let's set this discussion aside for now... Do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.

t_ch: 等之后再感慨吧。
t_en: Let's continue this conversation later, then.

t_ch: 的确，看看那复杂的道路…想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
t_en: Alright... In any case, do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.

t_ch: 和其他房间一样，这里的大门也被封印了…不过还是有好消息的，看那边，<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>。
t_en: The door here is sealed, just like all the other rooms... And yet, there's still a silver lining. Look over there. It's the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>.

t_ch: 据说那玩意源自{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的手笔，可以抓取重物，但需要一定天赋才能操纵…
t_en: According to legend, that object was created by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Although it can grab heavy objects, only people of sufficient talent can control it...

t_ch: 这里有这么多金币，想必是关于「偷窃」的考验。我猜只要偷走足够数量的金币，封印就能解开了…我没有驱动那玩意的天赋，你试试看？
t_en: There are so many gold coins here. This must be related to the "stealing" test. I guess we just need to steal enough coins for the seal to unlock... I don't have the kind of talent to activate that thing. You wanna give it a try?

t_ch: 随着封印解除，通往地宫更深处的路径再次畅通。
t_en: With the seal dispelled, the path to the deeper part of the hypogeum is open once more.

t_ch: 虽然不是第一次见，但我还是好奇…如此巨大的手，真能用来偷窃吗？
t_en: Although this is not the first time I've seen this item, I'm still curious about one thing... Can such an enormous hand really be used for theft?

t_ch: 没有目击者就是完美的潜入。
t_en: Any infiltration can be considered flawless if there's no one around to witness it.

t_ch: 的确。这么说来，用蛮力砸开银行大门也算偷窃的一种…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
t_en: Indeed. If so, I guess breaking open the entrance to a bank by force could also be viewed as a form of theft... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.

t_ch: 砸开银行大门不算偷吗？
t_en: Shouldn't breaking open the main entrance of a bank be considered a form of robbery?

t_ch: 这么说来，刺客也有消灭所有目击者来达成潜入的技巧…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
t_en: If that's the case, then assassins can be considered to have accomplished their infiltration by eliminating all witnesses... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.

t_ch: 不错，气氛活跃了一些。我们继续前进吧。
t_en: Well, it looks like the atmosphere has livened up quite a bit. Let's press on, then.

t_ch: 你们继续向地宫深处走去，身影在古老的走廊上拉得修长。
t_en: You progress even further into the depths of the hypogeum. Your silhouette elongates as you proceed down the ancient hallway.

t_ch: 通过这片区域之后，应该就是存放宝藏的金库了吧。算算距离，差不多也该到尽头了……
t_en: Past this area should be the vault where treasure would be stored. By estimating how far we've traveled, it seems like we're close to our goal...

t_ch: 坚持住，伙计，胜利近在咫尺……
t_en: Keep going for a while longer, buddy, for victory is at hand...

t_ch: 感觉坚持不住的反而是你…
t_en: Why do I feel like you're the one who isn't able to keep going?

t_ch: 我只是有些不祥的预感，我已经做过太多无用功了……
t_en: I merely have a sense of foreboding. After all, my previous efforts have all come to naught...

t_ch: 希望这次能有与之匹配的回报吧。
t_en: Hopefully, this time my effort will bear fruit.

t_ch: 这地方好像不能直接通过…有什么办法吗？
t_en: It looks like we can't pass through this area directly... Do you have any ideas?

t_ch: 刻法勒在上…这、这太神奇了！
t_en: By Kephale above... Th—This is absolutely incredible!

t_ch: 门开了，但这次你们没有义无反顾地前进…因为门的背后是更多、更多扇门。
t_en: Although the door's open, you don't proceed onward without hesitation like you did before... Because there are more and more doors behind this door.

t_ch: 因为门的背后是更多、更多的房间，连接它们的道路如树枝般交错延伸，有些甚至通往悬崖峭壁。
t_en: That's because behind this door lies even more rooms that are connected by a maze of paths that intertwine like the branches of a tree. Some of these paths even lead toward steep cliffs...

t_ch: 刻法勒在上啊…这还有完没完了！要想探完这里，怕是三辈子都不够用吧……
t_en: By Kephale above... Is there an end to this!? If we wish to explore all of them, it'll take us more than three lifetimes to do so...

t_ch: 唉，想想也是，如果这里真有好东西，怎么可能留给我们来拿？
t_en: *sigh* Now that I think about it, if there really was something valuable here, surely it wouldn't still be lying here for us to pick up?

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯陷入了低落，就像他第一次被告知「天外之界」并不存在的那天——你听见了幻想破灭的声音。
t_en: Damionis sinks into despondency, just like the time when he was first told that the "world beyond the sky" didn't actually exist... In fact, you can practically hear his dream shattering into pieces.

t_ch: 只要勇于开拓，总会抵达终点。
t_en: As long as you continue to blaze a trail, you will eventually reach your destination.

t_ch: 更多房间意味着更多可能性！
t_en: More rooms signify more possibilities, right?

t_ch: 这关都过不了，还怎么去天外？
t_en: If you can't even get past this hurdle, how do you still expect to venture beyond the sky?

t_ch: …也是，来都来了，不做成点什么总觉得欠口气。
t_en: ...You're right. Since I'm already here, I owe it to myself to see this through to the end.

t_ch: 但是就算继续深入，我估计也帮不上什么忙…不如以后我就在入口望风好了。万一有怪物逼近，我还能及时提醒你一下。
t_en: However, if we are to continue onward, I don't think I'll be of much help... Perhaps I should just stay by the entrance and act as a lookout. That way, if I spot any approaching monsters, I will be able to warn you in time.

t_ch: 你不会是想逃跑吧？
t_en: You're not trying to escape, are you?

t_ch: 怎么可能？探险家是不会抛弃同伴的！
t_en: Who do you take me for? Explorers never abandon their companions!

t_ch: 何况我要是真丢下你，回到圣城后谁还敢跟我组队？这笔账我是能算清的。
t_en: Besides, if I were truly to abandon you, who would dare team up with me again when I return to the holy city? I can figure out what's good for me.

t_ch: 你不会是想偷懒吧？
t_en: You're not planning to slack off, right?

t_ch: 怎、怎么能叫偷懒呢？这是分工，分工！
t_en: H—How can this be considered as slacking off? This is just a division of labor!

t_ch: 何况我要是真不干活，回到圣城后谁还愿意跟我组队？这笔账我是能算清的。
t_en: Besides, if I were really going to laze about, who would be willing to team up with me again when I return to the holy city? I can figure out what's good for me.

t_ch: 好，那就这么办。
t_en: Alright, let's do as you say then.

t_ch: 你居然这么信任我？真令人感动……
t_en: You have so much trust in me? I'm truly touched...

t_ch: 那就期待我们的继续协作吧，英雄。要是在里面找到什么东西，你先收着就好。
t_en: Well then, let's look forward to our continued cooperation, dear hero. If you find anything valuable in there, just keep it with you for now.

t_ch: 小心点，这后面有些路可能不止通往地下…如果遇到危险，可以跑回入口找我。
t_en: Be careful, for some of the upcoming paths may not merely lead further underground... If you encounter any danger, just run back to the entrance and find me.

t_ch: 随着最后一道封印解除，原本杂乱的前路收束为一，露出了通往地宫尽头的捷径。你连忙把这个消息告诉了达米亚诺斯……
t_en: As the final seal is broken, the initially chaotic paths merge into one, revealing a shortcut to the depths of the hypogeum. You hurriedly relay this development to Damionis...

t_ch: 居然真的有隐藏房间？比我想象中还要经典……
t_en: Wait, there really is a hidden room? This place is even more classic than I had imagined it to be...

t_ch: 不管怎么说，地宫大半部分都是由你独自完成探索的，这份荣耀也应当属于你。
t_en: Regardless, since you explored a majority of this hypogeum by yourself, the honor of uncovering its depths should also be yours.

t_ch: 你去吧。我会在后面守好来路的——万一门突然关上了，我会及时提醒你。
t_en: You should continue onward. I'll stay behind and keep watch over our return path. Should the door suddenly slam shut, I will promptly alert you.

t_ch: 你沿着那条捷径前进。道路一直向前延伸，将你引去了尽头的某个房间……
t_en: You follow the shortcut as it extends toward a room at the far end of the hypogeum...

t_ch: 宝箱的表面刻着一系列文字，虽然历经磨损，但还能辨认……
t_en: Lines of text are engraved upon the surface of the chest. Although the chest has suffered significant wear and tear, the inscribed words are still legible...

t_ch: 致可能到来的某人：你会来到这里，要么是外面的封印已经失效，要么是你亲手解开了它们——这证明了你的幸运或智慧。
t_en: To the person who manages to reach this place: The fact that you're here means that either the seals outside are no longer active or that you broke the seals yourself. Therefore, you're either very lucky or extremely intelligent.

t_ch: 黑潮的威胁愈发强烈。我们不得不带走一切能带走的东西，融入圣城的怀抱。我们将不再以萨白尼人自居。
t_en: The threat of the black tide grows ever stronger. We are forced to take as many of our belongings as possible and seek the holy city's embrace. No longer shall we live independently as Sabanians.

t_ch: 可我还是希望有人能记住我们家乡的名字，以及这里曾经发生过的一切。因此，我留下了这小小的一部分回忆。
t_en: Yet, I am still hopeful that people will still remember the name of our native home, as well as the events that have transpired here. This is why I have left a tiny portion of my memories here.

t_ch: 或许将来的某天，人们会回到故土，新生的孩子会知晓我们的一切、并在刻字石板前流泪…但我再也无法看到。
t_en: Perhaps someday, people will return to my birthplace once more, and newborn children will learn all about us and weep before this inscribed slate... Alas, I will not be around to witness such a scene.

t_ch: 希望那时的我们还能造出穹顶。
t_en: I pray that when that day arrives, we will still be able to construct a dome.

t_ch: ——最后一个萨白尼人。
t_en: —— The Last Sabanian

t_ch: 你打开箱子，里面是一些陈年杂物，以及一块蒙尘的刻字石板。这便是萨白尼人最后的遗产。
t_en: When you open the chest, you find some ancient items inside, as well as a text-inscribed stone slab that's covered in a layer of dust. These items form the final legacy that was left behind by the Sabanians.

t_ch: 你离开地宫，和达米亚诺斯在安全的地方汇合。
t_en: You leave the hypogeum and reunite with Damionis again at a safe location.

t_ch: 怎么样，有什么发现吗？
t_en: Well? Found anything?

t_ch: 我在地宫里发现了文物…
t_en: I discovered some artifacts in the hypogeum...

t_ch: 什么，真的有？能、能让我看一看吗……
t_en: Wait, really? C—Can I take a look at them...?

t_ch: 你展示了萨白尼人的遗产。
t_en: You show the Sabanians' legacy to him.

t_ch: …令人震惊，这些是货真价实的古代遗产。而且这块石板保存得相当完好，堪称极品！
t_en: ...How extraordinary. These are genuine pieces of ancient heritage, and this slab has been preserved surprisingly well. An exquisite relic indeed!

t_ch: 我就不问你都经历过什么奇遇了。收好吧，它们毕竟是你的战利品。
t_en: I won't ask you to elaborate on what you have experienced. Keep these priceless treasures safe, for they're yours now.

t_ch: 唉，看到这些玩意，我突然有种感慨——盛筵难再啊。
t_en: *sigh* I suddenly feel quite emotional when I look at these artifacts. After all, they are proof that good times never last.

t_ch: 昂扬向上的黄金年代并非永恒，进步与发展亦不是必然…曾经被众人视作救星的圣城，也终究难逃时间的侵蚀。
t_en: The optimistic and prosperous Golden Age cannot flourish endlessly, just as progress and advancement are never a guarantee... Even the holy city, once viewed by the masses as a beacon of hope, will also eventually succumb to the ravages of time.

t_ch: 倘若那个时代的人看到如今落魄的我们，大概会吐槽「这都什么不肖子孙」吧，哈哈……
t_en: If the people of that time were to witness the state that we're in right now, they would probably gripe about how we're a bunch of "unworthy descendants," haha...

t_ch: 至少你们仍在与黑潮对抗。
t_en: At least you're still resisting the black tide.

t_ch: 的确，那些奋战在一线的战士，还有城中的所有公民…他们的努力是真实存在的。
t_en: Indeed, the warriors fighting on the front lines, as well as all the citizens living in the city... Their hard work is plain to see.

t_ch: 希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
t_en: I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.

t_ch: 没必要给自己那么大鸭梨。
t_en: There's no need to put so much pressure on yourself... It might sour your ability to soar.

t_ch: 你是想说压力吧…哈，这活跃气氛的手法可真不咋样。
t_en: Was that your attempt at a joke...? Heh, the way you choose to liven up the atmosphere is middling at best.

t_ch: 不过…我确实感觉好受了些。眼下还有更重要的事去做，没空为宏大的东西感伤。
t_en: And yet... I actually feel better now. Seeing as how there are more important things to accomplish, now's not the time to feel sad over grandiose dreams.

t_ch: 活着就好，活着万岁！
t_en: Living is the best! Long live life!

t_ch: 是啊，至少我们还活着——这也是一种成功。
t_en: Yes, at least we're still alive... That is an accomplishment in itself.

t_ch: 希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
t_en: I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.

t_ch: 总之，守好这些东西。也许它们一百年后会变得更值钱也说不定呢。
t_en: Anyway, you should take good care of these things. Perhaps they'll be even more valuable a century from now.

t_ch: 啊，大门打开了！这样是不是就算通过试炼了？
t_en: The door is open! Does this count as clearing the trial?

t_ch: 一段时间后
t_en: Some time later...

t_ch: 据说，很久很久以前，奥赫玛城门口有八座山。
t_en: Once upon a time, so the story goes, eight mighty mountains blocked the entrance to Okhema.

t_ch: 这八座山堵塞了通往城区的路，为百姓生活带来了严重不便。
t_en: They cut off all paths to the city, making daily life a struggle for its citizens.

t_ch: 这时，一只比山还高的大地兽出现了。它一张口，便吃掉了其中七座，只剩如今刻法勒屁股下那座……
t_en: Then along came a dromas bigger than any mountain. One gulp later, seven mountains vanished, leaving only the one Kephale sits on now.

t_ch: 世人称它为，大•巨•极•大地兽•撕裂群山者•垃圾制造狂•后面编不出来了——简称「大撕垃」。
t_en: They named it the Super-Duper-Mega-Ultra-Dromas-Summit-Incisor-Litter-Launcher-Can'tMakeStuffUpAnymore — or "Dromasilla" for short.

t_ch: 这便是我喜爱大地兽的二百七十个理由之一：大即为美。也就是说，大地兽是世间最美丽的造物。
t_en: That's just one of the <unbreak>270</unbreak> reasons I love dromases: Bigger is more beautiful! Which makes dromases the most beautiful creatures in the world!

t_ch: 保真吗？
t_en: Wait, for real?

t_ch: 这野史也太野了。
t_en: That's quite the tall tale!

t_ch: 哦哦哦哦哦哦！
t_en: Wowwww!

t_ch: 诚然，故事整体的真实性有待考量，但其阐述了一个颇具评估价值的论点——人们认知中大地兽的体型，绝不是这一物种所能达到的极限。
t_en: Well, the story may be questionable, but it makes an interesting point. The dromas sizes we've seen are nowhere near what that species is truly capable of growing into.

t_ch: 还记得大地兽工坊的这颗蛋吗？据我推断，它拥有「大撕垃」的神魂。一旦孵化，便很可能成为新的<color=#dbc291ff>超•极•大地兽</color>。
t_en: Remember this egg in the Dromas Workshop? My research suggests it contains Dromasilla's soul. When it hatches, we might witness the birth of a new <color=#dbc291ff>Super Dromas</color>.

t_ch: 之后我要闭关一阵。在此期间，那颗蛋就托付给你了。千万别让它被愚昧之人破坏。
t_en: I need to go off-grid for a while. The egg is in your hands now. Keep the ignorant away from it, please.

t_ch: 为什么是我？
t_en: Why did you pick me?

t_ch: 我听遐蝶说了，你初抵奥赫玛时曾与大地兽游戏甚欢。被大地兽所喜爱的都不是坏人。
t_en: Castorice mentioned you had a great time with the dromases when you first got to Okhema. Anyone the dromases like is a good person in my book.

t_ch: 闭关？
t_en: Off-grid? What for?

t_ch: 准确地说，研究如何把这颗蛋孵出来。目前我有三十二种可行的方案，只是需要一些时间验证。
t_en: I'm researching how to hatch this egg, actually. I have thirty-two promising plans so far, but I need time to test them all.

t_ch: 超•极•大地兽？
t_en: Super Dromas? What's that?

t_ch: 最强、最劲、最具传奇色彩的大地兽。它是所有大地兽的牧人，会带领生灵们走向更美好的未来…咳，多余的修辞就不赘述了。
t_en: The strongest, mightiest, most legendary of dromas-kind. The shepherd to all dromases, guiding all beings toward a better future... *Ahem* Let's leave it at that.

t_ch: 定不辱使命！
t_en: You can count on me!

t_ch: 记住，出现问题，去找风堇助教。
t_en: Remember, if you need help, just look for Assistant Instructor Hyacine.

t_ch: 当天的幕匿时……
t_en: Later, at Curtain-Fall Hour...

t_ch: 一天什么都没做，好累啊……
t_en: I did absolutely nothing today. Why am I so tired?
Grum—Grumph... (H—Help...)

t_ch: 你…是…谁？
t_en: Who... Are... You?

t_ch: 鬼啊！
t_en: A GHOST! Aaaah!

t_ch: 你怎么了？
t_en: What's the matter?

t_ch: 呜…（我…出不来……）
t_en: Grumph... (I'm... stuck...)

t_ch: 你四下张望，目光最终落在那颗紫色的蛋上——它正开始出现裂痕。
t_en: Glancing around, you see the purple egg, now covered in cracks.

t_ch: 又没有外力干涉…该不会这么巧，它要在这时候孵化了吧？可别发生什么意外啊！
t_en: No one's near it... Is it hatching on its own? Right now? Hopefully nothing goes wrong!

t_ch: *激烈的拆蛋声*
t_en: *Intense sounds of the shell being ripped apart*
Grumph? (Hmm...?)

t_ch: 呜——嗡！（谢谢你！{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumphhh! (Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: 不知为何，这未来的超•极•大地兽长得有点…萌？
t_en: Strangely enough, this future Super Dromas looks surprisingly... cute?

t_ch: 好可爱，我要养它。
t_en: Aww, it's so cute! I'm keeping it.

t_ch: 没人能对可爱的生物说不，一种莫名的好感从你心底油然而生。
t_en: No one can say no to something this cute. You feel an inexplicable fondness growing inside you.

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡！（蹭蹭~蹭蹭~）
t_en: Grumph! (*Snuggles*)

t_ch: 不是你{F#妈}{M#爸}，别碰瓷！
t_en: Hey, I'm not your {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

t_ch: 呜嗡！呜嗡！（别，别走…）
t_en: Grumph! Grumph grumph! (No, don't go...)

t_ch: 出于本能，又或是出于不舍，这只初来世间的生物赖住了你。
t_en: By instinct or attachment, this newborn creature has decided to stick with you.

t_ch: 大地兽居然会说话？
t_en: Wait, dromases can talk?

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡？（说话？什么是说话？）
t_en: Grumph, grumph? (Talk? What is talk?)

t_ch: 不，它只是在发出「呜嗡」的叫声——但你能听懂。联觉信标，很神奇吧？
t_en: No, it's just making "grumph" sounds. But you understand it perfectly. That's the Synesthesia Beacon for you. Amazing, right?
*Gurgle*

t_ch: 嗡……？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我的肚子为什么会叫？）
t_en: Grumph...? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, why is my tummy growling?)

t_ch: 应该是饿了？记得大地兽吃的是红土…还好，这里是大地兽工坊，手边就有不少。
t_en: Is it hungry? Dromases eat redsoil, if you recall... Fortunately, the Dromas Workshop has plenty of it.

t_ch: 好了，要怎么办呢……
t_en: Alright. What should you do?

t_ch: 喂它红土。
t_en: Feed it some redsoil.

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡——（嘿嘿，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最好啦。）
t_en: Grumph, grumph— (Hehe, {F#mama}{M#papa} is the best.)

t_ch: 说罢，它便将一整桶红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
t_en: Then it gobbles up a whole bucket of redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

t_ch: 当着它的面吃掉红土。
t_en: Eat the redsoil yourself while it watches.

t_ch: 一回生，二回熟。你将红土塞进了自己的嘴里，期待着它能给出些有趣的反应——
t_en: Learning is by example. You shove redsoil into your mouth, hoping for an amusing reaction—

t_ch: 呃…苦——
t_en: Ugh... that's bitter—

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡。呜呜。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的脸好奇怪，哈哈。让我也试试——）
t_en: Grumph! Grumph grumph. Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa} looks so silly, haha. I'll try it too—)

t_ch: 说罢，它便将剩下的红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
t_en: Then it gobbles up all the remaining redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

t_ch: 喂它点别的。
t_en: Try feeding it something else.

t_ch: 你从兜里摸索出了几十种在各个世界搜集到的食物，想看看它喜欢哪个。
t_en: You search your pockets and find dozens of foods from different worlds, wondering which one it'll like.

t_ch: 只花了<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，它全吃了。天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
t_en: It only takes <unbreak>15</unbreak> seconds to eat everything. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（嗯！肚子不叫了，谢谢{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumph grumph! (Mmm! No more tummy sounds, thanks, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: ——单看容积，这孩子将来也许真能成长为一头参天巨兽——就像那刻夏故事里讲的那样。
t_en: Seeing how much it eats, this little one might really become a giant beast someday, just like in Anaxa's stories.

t_ch: 摸摸它的脑袋。
t_en: Pet its head.

t_ch: 呜嗡…
t_en: Grumph...

t_ch: 没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
t_en: Just simple sounds of happiness.

t_ch: 摸摸它的下巴。
t_en: Pet its chin.

t_ch: 呜！呜嗡…（嘻嘻…好痒啊…）
t_en: Grumph! Grumph... (Hehe... that tickles...)

t_ch: 仔细看看它。
t_en: Take a closer look at it.

t_ch: 它也用水汪汪的大眼睛盯着你。
t_en: It looks back at you with big, sparkly eyes.

t_ch: 摸摸它的脑袋。
t_en: Pet its head.

t_ch: 呜嗡…
t_en: Grumph...

t_ch: 没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
t_en: Just simple sounds of happiness.

t_ch: 摸摸它的下巴。
t_en: Pet its chin.

t_ch: 呜！呜嗡…（嘻嘻…好痒啊…）
t_en: Grumph! Grumph... (Hehe... that tickles...)

t_ch: 再仔细看看它。
t_en: Take another good look at it.

t_ch: 它歪歪头表示不解。
t_en: It tilts its head sideways, looking confused.

t_ch: 跟它大眼瞪小眼！
t_en: Staring contest, go!

t_ch: 呜嗡？（怎么啦？{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？要我摸摸你吗？）
t_en: Grumph? (What's up, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Should I pet you back?)

t_ch: 它可爱地杀死了比赛。
t_en: It wins the contest with pure cuteness.

t_ch: 呜呜…（咦，眼睛…睁不开了…）
t_en: Grumph... (Can't... stay awake...)

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我想，睡一会…）
t_en: Grumph... (I'm... sleepy...)

t_ch: 平稳的呼吸声传来，或许是因为有你陪着，它睡得十分安详。
t_en: Gentle breathing sounds fill the air. Your presence seems to help it sleep peacefully.

t_ch: 陪着它。
t_en: Stay with it.

t_ch: 眼下这个状态，你实在没法留它一个在这里。更何况——
t_en: You can't possibly leave it alone like this. Besides—

t_ch: 在附近转转。
t_en: Check out the nearby area.

t_ch: 你试着在不打扰它的状况下抽身离开…但却没能成功。
t_en: You try to sneak away without waking it... but can't.

t_ch: {F#它用小巧的前爪搭在你的靴子上，不愿让你离开。}{M#它用小巧的前爪攥住了你的裤脚，不愿松开。}
t_en: {F#Those tiny front paws have a death grip on your boots, and they're not budging.}{M#Those tiny front paws have a death grip on your clothes, and they're not budging.}

t_ch: 呜…（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}…）

t_en: (Trying to hold back laughter)

t_ch: 让我们看看人工队的表现。
t_en: Let's see how the human translator handles it, shall we?

t_ch: 啧…虽然还有改进空间，但至少这个翻译器生效了。
t_en: Tsk... While there's still room for improvement, at least this translator is working.

t_ch: 我是神悟树庭的教授，风堇女士的同僚，希望这能解答你的疑惑，小家伙。
t_en: I am a professor at the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of Lady Hyacine. I hope this answers your question, little one.

t_ch: 呜呜呜？（神悟树庭？是做什么的地方？）
t_en: Grumph? (Grove of Epiphany? What's that place?)

t_ch: 泰坦睡醒树木客厅？有什么了不起的？
t_en: Grope of Muffin? What's so big about that place?

t_ch: 怪不得联觉信标会引发战争。
t_en: No wonder the Synesthesia Beacon triggered wars.

t_ch: 老师，你听我解释……
t_en: Professor, allow me to explain...

t_ch: …好吧，之后还是由你来转述。
t_en: ...Alright. I'll let you do the translating from here.

t_ch: 相信应该你已经知道，这头大地兽…并非生来就超凡脱俗。但它拥有无限的潜力。
t_en: As you probably already know, this dromas... wasn't born extraordinary, but it possesses limitless potential.

t_ch: 只要有人细心呵护，它一定能成长到其他大地兽所不能及的高度——这项崇高的使命就交给你了。
t_en: With proper care and nurturing, it can grow to heights that other dromases could never reach. That noble task... now rests with you.

t_ch: 如果遇到什么问题，记得随时向我求问——再见，小家伙，祝你平安。
t_en: If anything comes up, don't hesitate to ask me. Farewell, little one, and stay safe.

t_ch: 他对你寄予厚望。
t_en: He has high hopes for you.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（有枪的老师，说什么都是对的。）
t_en: Grumph. (Teachers with guns are always right.)

t_ch: 你对他有何评价？
t_en: What's your take on him?

t_ch: 呜…嗡？（很温柔，但他为什么对着空气说话？难道他也有幻想朋友吗？）
t_en: Grumph... Grumph? (Very gentle... but why does he keep talking to the air? Could he have an imaginary friend too?)

t_ch: 好离谱的翻译器。
t_en: What a ridiculous translator.

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡…（偷偷告诉你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，其实也不算错…）
t_en: Grumph... (Just between us, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, that wasn't exactly wrong...)

t_ch: 不知等{TEXTJOIN#247}成长为完全体的那天，那刻夏会是什么表情。
t_en: You wonder what expression Anaxa will have when {TEXTJOIN#247} reaches its ultimate form.

t_ch: 灰宝！我要开心地宣布——{TEXTJOIN#247}已经完全恢复健康了！这都要归功于你和{TEXTJOIN#247}的共同努力！
t_en: Grayie! I'm thrilled to announce — {TEXTJOIN#247} has made a full recovery! All thanks to the hard work from both you and {TEXTJOIN#247}!

t_ch: 听到了吗！我们真棒！
t_en: Did you hear that! We're awesome!

t_ch: 呜嗡！（光明的未来在等着我们！）
t_en: Grumph! (A bright future awaits us!)

t_ch: 这下连粉丝观众都来了。
t_en: Even the fans are showing up now.

t_ch: 呜嗡？（要签名吗？可我的爪子握不了笔哦？）
t_en: Grumph? (Want an autograph? But my paws can't hold a pen though?)

t_ch: 太精彩了！就连我这「兽王」也久违地热血澎湃了起来。
t_en: That was incredible! Even I, the "Beast King," haven't felt this fired up in ages!

t_ch: 如果没猜错的话，它就是传闻中从蛋里蹦出来的那只大地兽，好像是叫…{TEXTJOIN#247}？想必你就是它的监护人，贵客{NICKNAME}了。
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, this must be that rumored dromas who popped out from the egg. I think the name was... {TEXTJOIN#247}. Which would make you its guardian, honored guest {NICKNAME}, correct?

t_ch: 大地兽不都是从蛋里蹦出来的？
t_en: Don't dromas all hatch from eggs?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，说的对，是我用词不当了——在蛋里待了好久都没蹦出来的。
t_en: Hahaha, fair point! My bad choice of words. I mean, the dromas that struggled forever to get out of its egg.

t_ch: 准确地说，我是它{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。
t_en: To be precise, I'm its {F#Mama}{M#Papa}.

t_ch: …哦哦，怪不得你俩长得像是一个模子里刻出来的！
t_en: ...Ohhh, no wonder you two look like two peas in a pod!

t_ch: 兽皇和兽帝在哪？
t_en: Where are the Beast Emperor and Beast Monarch?

t_ch: 阁下居然能猜出我们的组织架构！不过旅团的训练师等级最高只到「兽皇」，在我之下还有「兽师」和「兽者」…咳咳，扯远了。
t_en: You actually figured out our organizational structure? Impressive! Though the highest trainer rank in the troupe only goes up to "Beast Emperor," with "Beast Master" and "Beast Wielder" below me... Ahem, I'm getting off track.

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 两位可能有所耳闻，圣城郊外驻扎着一支大地兽旅团，在下正是旅团的对接人！
t_en: You two might have heard there's a dromas troupe stationed in the suburbs of the holy city, and I happen to be their liaison!

t_ch: 贵客还记得当初，和白厄阁下等人初访奥赫玛时所乘的大地兽吗？它们就是旅团的成员。
t_en: Dear guest, do you remember the dromas you rode with Lord Phainon and the others when you first visited Okhema? They are members of our troupe.

t_ch: 我看这只幼兽骨骼精奇，不如让它加入旅团，和我们一起成为圣城的璀璨新星吧！
t_en: This young beast has a remarkable bone structure and strong potential. What do you say we let it join the troupe and become the next shining star of the holy city?

t_ch: 呜…嗡？（我，非要变成星星不可吗？不能就当一只大地兽吗？）
t_en: Grumph... Grumph? (Do I really have to become a star? Can't I just stay as a dromas?)

t_ch: 奇怪，我居然…听不懂它在说什么？太神奇了！我干这行二十多年，还从没遇到过这种情况！
t_en: Strange... I can't understand what it's saying! This is incredible! In my twenty-plus years on the job, I've never encountered anything like this!

t_ch: 你能听懂大地兽话？
t_en: You can understand dromas language?

t_ch: 当然，不然我如何与旅团的那么多伙计们相处？看来，这只幼兽是我兽友生涯的一大挑战……
t_en: Of course. How else could I get along with so many dromas pals in the troupe? Though... this little one might just be a tough challenge in my beast-friend career.

t_ch: 呵，你成功引起了我的兴趣！
t_en: Heh, now you've piqued my interest!

t_ch: 没事，我可以翻译。
t_en: No worries. I can do the translation.

t_ch: 哦哦哦哦哦——你居然、居然可以和我沟通不了的大地兽沟通？
t_en: WHOOOA... You can actually talk to the dromas I can't!?

t_ch: 一天之内连续遭受两次打击，真是太爽了！人生就该充满惊喜！
t_en: Two hits in one day? Oh, just peachy! Life should be full of surprises like this!

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这人好奇怪啊。还好他不是大地兽，不然太丢兽啦。）
t_en: Grumphhhh. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, this person is so weird. Good thing he's not a dromas. What an embarrassment that'd be.)

t_ch: 咳咳…总之，我很看好它。等几周后大部队回来，我们详细聊聊吧。
t_en: Ahem... Anyway, I've got a good feeling about this one. Let's talk more about it in detail when the main forces return in a few weeks.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我懂的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这种时候就该自卖自夸一番！）
t_en: Grumph... (I get it, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Now's the time to hype myself up a little!)

t_ch: 呜嗡！（只要再长大一些，我就能走上兽生巅峰，成为大地兽中的大地兽啦！）
t_en: Grumph! (Just wait until I grow up a bit more. I'll rise to the very top of the beast world and become the dromas among dromases! Just you wait!)

t_ch: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
t_en: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

t_ch: 它的身后跟着追随者无数，它的餐桌上堆满最高等的红土，它的头像甚至被刻在硬币上……
t_en: This dromas has countless followers in its wake, its table piled high with the finest redsoil, its face even minted on coins...

t_ch: 人们都说，它的兽生已经抵达了巅峰，但它仍没有停止前进。或许只有它自己知道，大地兽的终点在何方……
t_en: People say it has attained life's zenith, yet the dromas never stopped. Perhaps only the dromas itself knows where its final destination lies...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，好可爱！
t_en: Hehe, so adorable!

t_ch: 孩子的成长总是令人欣喜的，你阖上双眼，畅想着{TEXTJOIN#247}即将步入的美好未来——
t_en: A child's growth is always a joy to behold. You close your eyes and begin to picture the bright future awaiting {TEXTJOIN#247} —

t_ch: 感觉不怎么正经。
t_en: It feels sus.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（哈哈，其实我还挺有兴趣的。）
t_en: Grumph. (Haha, I'm actually quite interested.)

t_ch: 你怎么想？
t_en: What do you think?

t_ch: 呜嗡！（其实…我还挺有兴趣的！）
t_en: Grumph! (Actually... I'm quite interested!)

t_ch: 呜嗡。（而且，这位奇怪的大叔大概不是什么坏人，只是不太像人。）
t_en: Grumph. (Besides, this strange guy probably isn't a bad person. He just doesn't seem very... human.)

t_ch: 呜嗡！（离人越远，离大地兽越近！）
t_en: Grumph! (The further from humans, the closer to dromas!)

t_ch: 总之，先别想这些了…
t_en: Anyway, let's not think about all that for now...

t_ch: 还是先庆祝顺利通过检查吧。
t_en: Let's celebrate passing the check first.

t_ch: 虽然这只是美好的幻想，但你和{TEXTJOIN#247}都坚信，未来就近在咫尺！
t_en: Even if it's just a lovely dream, you and {TEXTJOIN#247} both believe that greatness awaits!

t_ch: 呜嗡！（没错，我会成为最强最劲的超•极•大地兽口牙……）
t_en: Grumph! (Absolutely! I'll be the greatest Super Dromas ever...)
Grumph? (Eh?)

t_ch: 不该半场开香槟。
t_en: Totally forgot. Never count your dromases before they're hatched.

t_ch: 原来大地兽是充气的……
t_en: Turns out dromases are basically balloons with legs...

t_ch: 你怎么瘪了？
t_en: Why did you shrink!?

t_ch: 呜嗡？！？！（我怎么变小了啊？！？！）
t_en: Grumph!?!? (Why did I shrink!?!?)

t_ch: 《小小一只大地兽》，全剧终！
t_en: The Tiny Little Dromas, The End!

t_ch: 一段时间后，风堇带你们转移到了奥赫玛的昏光庭院，并进行了简单的检查
t_en: Shortly after, Hyacine takes you to the Twilight Courtyard for a quick medical examination.

t_ch: 呜呜呜呜，呜嗡——（不对，我一定在做梦，一定是昨天吃了不该吃的东西…）
t_en: Grumphhhhhh, grumph— (This must be a bad dream... Probably ate something funky yesterday.)

t_ch: 你昨天吃什么了？
t_en: What did you eat yesterday?

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡嗡（清蒸房梁，选用硬质红土打造。）
t_en: Grumph, grumph. (Steamed ceiling beam, made of solid redsoil.)

t_ch: 能变回去吗？
t_en: Can you become big again?

t_ch: 呜嗡！呜嗡——！（我也想啊！虽然可爱点也挺好的…但我还是想长大啦——）
t_en: Grumph! Grumph—! (If only I could! Cuteness is great, but I want to grow up already—!)

t_ch: 呀，不、不要慌。我们来想想办法——打针能治好吗？草药能治吗？说到底这真的是疾病吗？怎么办怎么办怎么办……
t_en: Oh no, d—don't worry. Let's figure this out. Would medication work? Maybe herbs? Is this even a medical condition? How do we fix this...

t_ch: 不要慌。
t_en: Stay calm.

t_ch: 这还真是新鲜…
t_en: Well, that's new...

t_ch: 等我！我这就去查一下友爱之馆的藏书……
t_en: Wait here! I'll check the archives at the Library of Philia...

t_ch: ——不用浪费时间了，助教，现在树庭中的记叙都是谬论！
t_en: Don't waste your time, Hyacine. Everything in the Grove's records is misleading!

t_ch: 穿华服的大地兽！我们有救了。
t_en: Dromas draped in finery! We're saved!

t_ch: 你是不是一直在等露脸的机会…
t_en: Were you just waiting for your chance in the spotlight...

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，你刚刚在门廊站了好久，我还以为……
t_en: Professor Anaxa, you were standing on the porch for so long. I thought...

t_ch: 咳！先说结论，这一现象确实类似疾病，是因身上的「岁月」神力失衡所致。
t_en: Ahem! To get straight to the point, this phenomenon does indeed resemble an illness, caused by an imbalance in the divine power of Time within the body.

t_ch: 恩师曾与我聊起过一位天赋异禀的祭司，在他步入敬拜之道前也曾历经此疾，以致他年过半百时，外貌还如少年一般。
t_en: My teacher once told me about a gifted priest who had suffered from this condition before he embraced the path of Venerationism. Because of it, even in his fifties, he still had the appearance of a young man.

t_ch: 你长不大了。
t_en: You'll never grow up now.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡。（做梦而已，发生什么我都不会相信的。）
t_en: Grumphhhh. (It's just a dream. I wouldn't believe anything that happens anyway.)

t_ch: 能治吗，大夫？
t_en: Doctor, can it be cured?

t_ch: 这病我也想得。
t_en: I wish I had that problem.

t_ch: 呵，能患上此种疾病并非缺陷，而是意味着它受到了欧洛尼斯的青睐——比起治疗，更需要的是学会控制这份礼物。
t_en: Heh. To be afflicted by such a condition isn't a flaw. That means it has been favored by Oronyx. What it needs isn't a cure — but the strength to control this gift.

t_ch: 让它领悟欧洛尼斯的祷言，问题自然迎刃而解。而让它学会祷言就是你接下来的课题了，{NICKNAME}——我言尽于此。
t_en: Once it masters the prayer of Oronyx, the issue will naturally resolve itself. Which brings us to your next assignment, {NICKNAME} — teach it the prayer. That's all I have to say.

t_ch: …接受现实吧。
t_en: ...Just accept it already.

t_ch: 呜呜……（只要能治好就行……）
t_en: Grumph... (As long as it can be cured...)

t_ch: 我教祷言？真的假的？
t_en: Me, teaching prayers? Seriously?
